mapper.sql: id, fund_detail_item_id, snapshot_id, rank_no, stock_name, stock_code, market, daily_return, holding_ratio, quarter_change_type, quarter_change_value, missing_reasons_json, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM fund_top_holding WHERE fund_detail_item_id = #{fundDetailItemId} ORDER BY rank_no ASC
SELECT FROM fund_top_holding WHERE snapshot_id = #{snapshotId} ORDER BY fund_detail_item_id ASC, rank_no ASC
SELECT FROM fund_top_holding WHERE stock_code = #{stockCode} ORDER BY id DESC
